WITH LowestConsumption AS (
    SELECT
        c.Segment,
        y.CustomerID,
        y.Consumption,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY c.Segment ORDER BY y.Consumption ASC) AS rank
    FROM
        customers c
    JOIN
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE
        y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
        AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
),
FilteredCustomers AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        Consumption
    FROM
        LowestConsumption
    WHERE
        rank = 1
)

    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM
    FilteredCustomers
GROUP BY
    Segment;

125:
SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    district d
JOIN 
    account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN 
    disp disp ON a.account_id = disp.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON disp.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'

FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id

169:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1997 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
      SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
     SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(l.date) = 1996 THEN l.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M';

116:
SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id AND t1.date = '1993-03-22' AND t2.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    t1.account_id IN (
        SELECT 
            d.account_id
        FROM 
            client AS c
        JOIN 
            disp AS d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
        JOIN 
            loan AS l ON d.account_id = l.account_id
        WHERE 
            l.date = '1993-07-05'
    )

FROM trans t
JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE t.type = 'VYDAJ' AND t.date LIKE '1996-01%'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY total_withdrawal DESC
LIMIT 10;
